THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF LIPSKY, ADAM RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT COINBASE, INC. $5,000.00 PRINCIPAL, $75.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $5,075.00, OR DEFENDANT COINBASE INC., MAY ALTERNATIVELY REFUND PLAINTIFF'S INITIAL $5000.00 DEPOSIT. DEFENDANT COINBASE GLOBAL, INC. IS DISMISSED WITH PREJUDICE. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
MOTION TO VACATE JUDGMENT FILED BY DEFENDANT COINBASE, INC. HEARING SET FOR JAN-11-2023 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506
ORDER RE:REQUEST TO APPEAR AT HEARING BY ZOOM GRANTED** PLAINTIFF
REMARK: DEFENDANT(COINBASE) EXHIBITS RECD VIA MAIL SUBMITTED

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF NOV-16-2022 - JUDGMENT. PLAINTIFF ADAM LIPISKI IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT COINBASE INC., REPRESENTED BY JERRY NACOSTE IS PRESENT (VIA UNAUTHORIZED ZOOM APPEARANCE) DEFENDANT COINBASE GLOBAL INC., IS NOT PRESENT. DEFENDANT COINBASE INC. DID NOT FILE A REQUEST FOR ZOOM APPEARANCE OR AN SC-109 AUTHORIZATION TO APPEAR. THE COURT DOES NOT ALLOW MR. NACOSTE TO APPEAR ON BEHALF OF THE DEFENDANT COINBASE INC. MATTER MOVES FORWARD WITH TRIAL AS BEING AN UNCONTESED MATTER. (SEE NOTES) PLAINTIFF STIPULATES TO THE JUDGE PRO TEM WILLIAM LYNN HEARING TODAY'S MATTER. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE PRO TEM: WILLIAM LYNN; CLERK: W. TRUPEK. NOT REPORTED. (506)
REQUEST TO APPEAR AT HEARING BY ZOOM FILED BY PLAINTIFF LIPSKY, ADAM

MOTION TO VACATE JUDGMENT FILED BY DEFENDANT COINBASE, INC. ON DEC-12-2023 - DENIED. PLAINTIFF ADAM LIPSKY IS PRESENT VIA ZOOM. DEFENDANT COINBASE, INC. IS PRESENT (VIA UNAUTHORIZED ZOOM), REPRESENTED BY JERRY NACOSTE (SENIOR SUPPORT). COURT ALLOWED DEFENDANT'S ZOOM APPEARANCE FOR TODAY'S HEARING. OATH ADMINISTERED. PLAINTIFF EXHIBITS RETAINED. VISITING JUDGE: RONALD E. QUIDACHAY; CLERK: D. AU. NOT REPORTED. (D506)
